project_context.target_audience: Hospital procurement managers, clinic owners, doctors, dealers in Telangana, India
project_context.aesthetic: Clinical, high-trust, fast-loading medical aesthetic. Not consumer/startup.

rules.headings: Tracking tight, use font-light or font-black for radical weight contrast.
rules.body: Use leading-relaxed for long-form, leading-tight for UI elements.
rules.labels: Uppercase, tracking-[0.2em] for table headers and overlines.

colors.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity, Truth) + Medical Precision

marketing_pages.spacing: Generous (p-8, p-12, p-16). Containers with borders must have internal padding.
marketing_pages.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align paragraphs and dense content.

crm_dashboard.spacing: Tight (gap-4, gap-6). Use h-full to stretch items. Every pixel must be utilized.

technical_rules: Grid items must be direct children of grid containers.
Use 'display: grid; grid-template-columns: subgrid' when nesting is unavoidable.
Override stretch with 'align-items: start' if needed.

buttons.whatsapp_cta: WhatsApp Green, white text, Phosphor WhatsApp icon.
buttons.secondary: Outline button with Deep Blue text and border. Use for 'Download Brochure'.

components.mega_menu: Hierarchical structure, clear typography, dark hover states for high contrast.
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px solid strokes (border-slate-200) instead of soft shadows. NO glassmorphism for medical data.
components.crm_pipeline: Kanban board style using strict grid hierarchy. Color coded statuses using subtle background tints.
components.trust_footer: MUST include MD-42 Wholesale License, GST number, and ISO details visible.

motion.hover: Explicit color shifts (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white). Focus states must have higher contrast.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform, transition-colors). Never transition-all.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Minimal animations in CRM to favor speed.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Avoid gray-on-gray.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-chat-btn').

media.strategy: High-fidelity clinical imagery. Zoom in on close-ups to create intimacy.

image_urls.description: State-of-the-art operating room, highly clinical. Use for homepage hero.
Lab tech looking through microscope. Use for Diagnostics division.
Large warehouse interior, docked truck. Use for about page / supply chain trust.
Online medical consultation with tablet. Use for CRM mock data or Contact page.

visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for marketing grids. Lucide-react for standard Shadcn UI.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise or grain overlays in dark footer to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.3d_libraries: Skip 3D for this clinical B2B context. Focus on 2D precision and fast loading.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard Shadcn components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ but strip the generic 'Vercel-look'.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts. Do not use Shadcn 'Card' for complex overlapping marketing layouts.
Include 8 specific medical divisions in navigation: Orthopedics, Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, ENT, Endo-surgical, Infection Prevention, Peripheral Intervention.
Never use generic HTML elements for complex inputs (use Shadcn Select, Calendar, Dialog).
Ensure Footer strictly shows MD-42 Wholesale License and GST.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern pill-shaped or sharp button styles with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, 🧠, etc.) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
